mapper.select: SELECT MENU_ID AS ID, MENU_NM AS TEXT, GRAD, NVL(UP_MENU_ID, '#') AS PARENT, ORDR, 'R' AS CRUD FROM MENU WHERE 1=1 AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY GRAD, PARENT, ORDR
SELECT MENU_ID , MENU_NM , MENU_COURS , ORDR , USE_YN , 'R' AS CRUD FROM MENU WHERE UP_MENU_ID = #{ menuId } ORDER BY ORDR
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM MENU WHERE UP_MENU_ID = #{ menuId }
